title: 1st NFTs @hyperliquidx mint live!
summary_title: First fully on-chain NFT collection on Hyperliquid EVM, minted by pixel artist
summary_description: Bren launches tiny Hypercats, the first native on-chain NFTs on Hyperliquid, requiring big blocks and HYPE gas token.

key_moments.label: Host introduces Bren, congrats on launch
Minting mechanics explained: need active wallet via USDC deposit
Dual block architecture: 2M gas (1s) vs 10M gas (60s)
Bren claims first native fully on-chain NFT collection on Hyperliquid
Bren's journey from GIF animator to on-chain developer
Why on-chain: immutable, no IPFS fees, permanent storage
Hyperliquid EVM stealth launch, no insider advantage
Speculation: minting activity may count toward future airdrop points

pull_quote: I like the fact that you can deploy a fully on-chain art contract for like 20 cents, maybe even less on base, and you never have to pay IPFS fees.
